commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Then all the princes of the sea shall come down from their thrones, and lay away their robes, and put off their embroidered garments: they shall clothe themselves with trembling; they shall sit upon the ground, and shall tremble at every moment, and be astonished at you. Sea: colonies, or tributary to Tyre, ver. (Haydock) Leptis, Utica, Carthage,and Cadiz, were founded by Tyrians. ) Some pretend that these cities were attacked by the conquerors, for manifesting their grief. See Josephus, Antiquities x. ; Pineda But we shall not here follow conjectures. Astonishment. Hebrew, "troubles "or mourning.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
